command:
import asyncio, sys, io
sys.stdout=io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer,encoding='utf-8',errors='replace')
sys.stderr=io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer,encoding='utf-8',errors='replace')
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright
async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.connect_over_cdp('http://localhost:9222')
        ctx = browser.contexts[0]
        pages = ctx.pages
        print(f'Existing pages: {len(pages)}')
        target = None
        for i,pg in enumerate(pages):
            u = pg.url
            print(f'  page[{i}]: {u[:80]}')
            if 'maps' in u or 'add-a-place' in u or 'business.google' in u or 'contrib' in u:
                target = pg
        if not target and pages:
            target = pages[0]
            print('No maps page found, using first page')
            await target.goto('https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/0/add-a-place', wait_until='domcontentloaded', timeout=20000)
            await asyncio.sleep(2)
        if target:
            print(f'Target URL: {target.url[:100]}')
            inputs = await target.query_selector_all('input')
            print(f'Inputs: {len(inputs)}')
            for i,inp in enumerate(inputs[:15]):
                n=(await inp.get_attribute('name') or '')
                ar=(await inp.get_attribute('aria-label') or '')
                vis=await inp.is_visible()
                val=''
                if vis:
                    try: val=await inp.input_value()
                    except: pass
                print(f'  [{i}] name={n} aria={ar} vis={vis} val={val[:30]}')
            btns = await target.query_selector_all('button')
            print(f'Btns: {len(btns)}')
            for i,b in enumerate(btns[:10]):
                try:
                    txt=await b.inner_text()
                    print(f'  btn[{i}]: {txt[:40]}')
                except: pass
asyncio.run(main())
description: Playwright CDP - استخدام الصفحة الموجودة فعلا بدل فتح جديدة
